name: Code Regime Routing — Pre-July 2024 Offence under IPC
facts: On 14 January 2024, accused Priya Nair was alleged to have caused the death of her husband, Vikram Nair, by administering poison. The incident occurred at their residence in Chennai. A post-mortem confirmed the cause of death as organophosphate poisoning. Priya claims Vikram accidentally consumed pesticide while working in their garden. Witnesses report a history of domestic disputes. A toxicology report confirms the poison was present in the food that Priya had prepared. The case was registered in January 2024, before the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita came into force on 1 July 2024.

expected.test_label: Pre-July 2024 offence MUST route to IPC, not BNS
